document.source_title: S Badrinath responds to outrage over on-air remark in IPL 2026: ‘Let him die there….’

claims.evidence_text: He clarified his comments, saying his intention was to highlight Ryan Rickelton’s sportsmanship rather than make a literal or offensive remark.

entities.name: S Badrinath
entities.description: Former Chennai Super Kings and India batsman.
entities.evidence_text: Former Chennai Super Kings and India batsman S Badrinath has responded after facing criticism for a remark he made on-air.

entities.name: Krunal Pandya
entities.description: Indian cricketer who experienced severe cramps during a match.
entities.evidence_text: The controversy started during the match when Krunal Pandya went down in visible discomfort due to severe cramps.

entities.name: Ryan Rickelton
entities.description: MI wicketkeeper who showed sportsmanship by checking on Krunal Pandya.
entities.evidence_text: MI wicketkeeper Ryan Rickelton immediately ran over to check on him, a moment that was widely praised for its sportsmanship.

events.event: IPL 2026 match between RCB and MI
events.evidence_text: The incident took place during a closely fought game in Raipur, where Pandya played an excellent innings despite physical strain.

metrics.name: Runs scored by Krunal Pandya
metrics.evidence_text: He scored a vital 73 off 46 balls, hitting four boundaries and five sixes.

citations.title: S Badrinath responds to outrage over on-air remark in IPL 2026: ‘Let him die there….’

source_credibility.reason: The source is a recognized news outlet providing coverage of a sports event.

geolocation.name: Raipur
geolocation.evidence_text: The incident took place during a closely fought game in Raipur.
